news.t: Motley Fool Asset Management To Launch Series of New ETFs to Complete Core Portfolio Allocations
The RBB Fund Completes the Motley Fool Mutual Fund to ETF Conversions

holdings.infoBox: TMFM is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are StoneX Group stock at 10.38%, DexCom at 5.16%, HealthEquity at 5.03%, West Pharmaceutical Services at 4.90%, and GXO Logistics at 4.56%.

overview.description: The Motley Fool Mid-Cap Growth ETF (TMFM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of US mid-cap companies with quality growth characteristics, selected based on qualitative and quantitative factors. TMFM was launched on Jun 17, 2014 and is issued by The Motley Fool.
